title: DRDO CFEES Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 15 Posts
organization: Centre for Fire Explosive and Environment Safety (DRDO CFEES)
short_info: Centre for Fire Explosive and Environment Safety (DRDO CFEES) Paid Internship Notification 2026 has been released on 20-05-2026 on the official website drdo.gov.in. A total of 15 vacancies have been announced through the DRDO CFEES Paid Internship Recruitment 2026. Candidates with a maximum age limit of 28 years who are pursuing UG (Final Year) Engineering or pursuing PG (Final Year) Science courses are eligible to apply for these Paid Internship vacancies. The offline application process for DRDO CFEES Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 has started on 20-05-2026 and will remain open until 05-06

qualification.education_qualification: Pursuing UG (Final Year) Engineering Students, Pursuing PG (Final Year) Science Students
qualification.details: Environmental science/ Engineering: Engineering Students: Pursuing UG (Final Year) / Science Students: Pursuing PG (Final Year) Electronics / Electronic & Communication Engineering / Electronic Telecommunication / Electronic & Instrumentation / Embedded System Engineering: Engineering Students: Pursuing UG (Final Year) / Science Students: Pursuing PG (Final Year) Mechanical / Automation Engineering: Engineering Students: Pursuing UG (Final Year) / Science Students: Pursuing PG (Final Year) Chemical Engineering / Chemistry: Engineering Students: Pursuing UG (Final Year) / Science Students: Pursuing PG (Final Year) AI&ML / Data Science: Engineering Students: Pursuing UG (Final Year) / Science Students: Pursuing PG (Final Year) Computer Science & Engineering / Information Technology: Engineering Students: Pursuing UG (Final Year) / Science Students: Pursuing PG (Final Year)

vacancy_details.Post Name: Electronics / Electronic & Communication Engineering / Electronic Telecommunication / Electronic & Instrumentation / Embedded System Engineering

selection_process: Merit based on academic track record (≥80% marks or ≥8.0 CGPA) Referral letter from Principal/Director Shortlisting Document Verification at joining
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DRDO CFEES Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 05-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DRDO CFEES Paid Internship?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the DRDO CFEES Paid Internship is 05 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this date to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Paid Internship at DRDO CFEES?
faq.answer: There are a total of 15 vacancies available for the Paid Internship posts at the Centre for Fire Explosive and Environment Safety (DRDO CFEES).

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility criteria for the Paid Internship?
faq.answer: Candidates pursuing their final year of UG Engineering or final year of PG Science are eligible to apply for this internship program.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Paid Internship?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the Paid Internship posts is 28 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the stipend offered for the Paid Internship?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Paid Internship will receive a stipend of Rs. 5000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. How will the candidates be selected for the internship?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on merit, considering academic performance (≥80% marks or ≥8.0 CGPA), a referral letter from the Principal/Director, followed by shortlisting and document verification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the DRDO CFEES Paid Internship?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) to apply for the DRDO CFEES Paid Internship.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the DRDO CFEES Paid Internship is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q9. When will the selected candidates be informed and when does the internship start?
faq.answer: Selected students will be informed by 15 June 2026, and the internship training is scheduled to commence on 01 July 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the DRDO CFEES located?
faq.answer: The Centre for Fire Explosive and Environment Safety (DRDO CFEES) is located in Delhi, with the pincode 110054.
